title: Admin-Editable Contact Us, Customer Project Gallery, and Admin Icon Login

requirements.text: Ensure the Contact Us page admin editing capability is accessible from the admin dashboard at any time. The ContactInfoManagementPage must be linked from the admin dashboard quick-link cards so admins can navigate to it directly to update email, phone, address, and Google Maps link. The link should be clearly labeled 'Edit Contact Info' and protected by AdminGuard.

quotes: make contact us editable for admin anytime

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard has a visible 'Edit Contact Info' quick-link card
Clicking the card navigates to ContactInfoManagementPage
The page is protected by AdminGuard and only accessible to logged-in admins
Admin can update email, phone, address, and Google Maps link and save changes
Updated contact info is immediately reflected on the public ContactUsPage

requirements.text: Make the Project Gallery page fully public and customer-facing. Remove any admin-only gate or authentication requirement for viewing projects. The gallery must display project images, titles, descriptions, and categories for all visitors (logged in or not). The add/edit/delete project controls must remain visible only to authenticated admins.

quotes: make project gallary open for customer show our pictures and deatils of projects

acceptanceCriteria: ProjectGalleryPage is accessible to unauthenticated (guest) users without any login prompt
Each project card displays the project image, title, description, and category
Clicking a project card opens a detail view or expanded view with full project information
Category filter buttons are visible and functional for all users
Add/Edit/Delete project controls are only shown to authenticated admin users

requirements.text: Add a project detail modal or expanded view on the ProjectGalleryPage so that when a customer clicks a project card, a full-screen or overlay dialog opens showing the project image at larger size, title, full description, and category label.

quotes: show our pictures and deatils of projects

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking any project card opens a detail dialog/modal
The modal shows the full-size project image, project title, full description, and category
The modal has a close button and can be dismissed by clicking outside or pressing Escape
The detail view is accessible to all users including unauthenticated guests

requirements.text: Add an admin icon (e.g., a shield or user-cog icon) to the app header or bottom navigation bar. When clicked, unauthenticated users are navigated to the AdminLoginPage. When an admin is already logged in, clicking the icon navigates directly to the AdminDashboardPage, bypassing the login page.

quotes: make admin login on admin icon after admin loged

acceptanceCriteria: An admin icon (shield or settings icon) is visible in the header or navigation area
Clicking the icon when not logged in redirects to /admin/login
Clicking the icon when logged in as admin redirects to /admin/dashboard
The icon is always visible but does not expose admin controls to non-admins
After admin login, clicking the same icon goes directly to the admin dashboard without showing the login page again

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko backend logic must remain in the single actor in backend/main.mo
Admin create/edit/delete project actions must remain protected by AdminGuard
nonGoals: Adding new backend data fields for projects beyond what already exists
Changing the authentication mechanism (Internet Identity remains the only auth method)
Adding real-time updates or WebSocket-based gallery refresh
Redesigning the overall app theme or color scheme
